summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration; public enum EvolutionPhase { INTENT_EXPANSION, ARCHITECTURE_VARIANTS, SELECTION_REFINEMENT, IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN, FINAL_SYNTHESIS, TERMINAL_SUCCESS, TERMINAL_FAILURE; public static EvolutionPhase fromString(String phase) { if (phase == null) return INTENT_EXPANSION; try { return EvolutionPhase.valueOf(phase); } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) { switch (phase) { case "INTENT_EXPANSION": return INTENT_EXPANSION; case "ARCHITECTURE_VARIANTS": return ARCHITECTURE_VARIANTS; case "SELECTION_REFINEMENT": return SELECTION_REFINEMENT; case "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN": return IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN; case "FINAL_SYNTHESIS": return FINAL_SYNTHESIS;
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
